articles.title: The next great tech leap may be built on videos of people folding laundry - The Washington Post
articles.description: Tech firms aim to trigger a robot revolution with video of humans doing housework. Gig workers are paid up to $25 an hour to film themselves doing various tasks.

articles.title: Amazon will reportedly never release another new Android-based Fire TV Stick — It’s Vega OS only from this point on - AFTVnews
articles.description: With this week's disappointing release of the new Fire TV Stick HD, Amazon's second streaming device to run its Vega operating system, the future of Android-based Fire TVs is looking bleak.
